title: cattleya × manglesii
intro: Cattleya × manglesii, also known as the Mangles Cattleya, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Cattleya mossiae and Cattleya skinneri. This plant is prized for its vibrant flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The Cattleya × manglesii is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including aiding in the relief of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant's roots and flowers are used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
